headline: Qualcomm strikes AI chip deal with TikTok owner ByteDance, Bloomberg News reports
summary: Qualcomm reached a deal with TikTok owner ‌ByteDance to supply chips for ‌AI data centers, Bloomberg News reported ​on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter. Shares of the smartphone chip designer rose about 5%. ByteDance ‌is set to ⁠procure millions of Qualcomm chips known as application-specific ⁠integrated circuits to help support the social media company's AI ​agent software, ​according the ​report.

headline: Automotive Hypervisor Market: USD 1.51 Billion by 2031 with Light Commercial Vehicles (LCVs) Advancing at a 19.41% CAGR, Reports Mordor Intelligence
summary: According to the latest report by Mordor Intelligence, the automotive hypervisor market size is projected to grow from USD 0.57 billion in 2026 to USD 1.51 billion by 2031, registering a CAGR of 21.49% during 2026-2031. Growth is being driven by the shift toward software-defined vehicles, where automakers are integrating multiple ECU functions into centralized domain controllers while ensuring secure workload separation. Increasing cybersecurity regulations, growing ADAS complexity, and efforts

headline: SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
summary: Most investors buy Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) because the fund’s reputation tells them they are buying diversification. SCHD has 105 holdings, screens hard on dividend quality, and charges 0.06%. The retiree who built an income sleeve around SCHD usually has not read the holdings list. headline: Qualcomm ByteDance AI Chip Deal Highlights Expanding Data Center Ambitions
summary: Qualcomm (NasdaqGS:QCOM) has agreed to supply millions of AI chips to ByteDance, the owner of TikTok. The deal marks one of Qualcomm's first major wins in the AI data center accelerator market. The agreement expands Qualcomm's reach beyond its core smartphone processor business into AI infrastructure. For Qualcomm, long known for mobile processors and connectivity solutions, this ByteDance agreement highlights how AI data center hardware is becoming a bigger part of the story. Large...
